hero.heading:
Never let a training
insight slip away.
hero.subtext:
Open your phone right after practice and record in seconds.
A digital training journal built specifically for Aikido.

painPoints.title: Sound familiar?
items:
Can't remember what you
learned during practice

Input is too tedious,
so you never keep up
with training records

When you want to look back,
you can't find the record you're
looking for
painPoints.imageAlt: Illustration of an aikido practitioner struggling with concerns

solutionRecording.subtitle: When practice is over, take out your phone and start recording right away.

steps.title: Create a page with one tap
steps.body: Just tap "Create Page" from the home screen.

steps.title: Select Aikido technique tags
steps.body: Choose from Aikido tags for tori, uke, and technique names such as "Ikkyo," "Iriminage," and "Katatedori." No need to type the same name repeatedly — easy one-handed operation.

steps.title: Jot down your insights and save
steps.body: Write down what you felt during training and save. Transform a fading memory into a solid record in the few minutes it takes to get from the dojo to home.

solutionSearch.title:
Find past records
instantly.
solutionSearch.body: Tags, dates, and free-word search. Combine multiple filters to smoothly reach the training record you're looking for. Even if your memory is hazy, no problem. It's also perfect for quickly reviewing on your phone before training.

newFeature.title:
Feel the progress of
your training in numbers.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.body: Automatically tallies training days attended, consecutive practice period, and number of pages created. Understand monthly trends through bar graphs, and view practice tendencies by standing technique, seated technique, and technique name through pie charts — all at a glance. Great for tracking your training days ahead of your next examination.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.body: Quickly check training attendance and record creation dates on a calendar. Tap a date to log your training attendance or create a page for that day on the spot.

snsCommunity.title:
Connect through Aikido —
beyond dojo walls and
national borders.
snsCommunity.intro: Aikido practitioners exist all over the world. Yet there are few places where the learnings from training can be shared across dojo and language barriers.
snsCommunity.heroImageAlt: Illustration of aikido practitioners worldwide connecting via smartphones

share.title: Share Your Training Records
share.body: Publish and share your training records as they are. Gain insights from different perspectives on the same technique.
share.imageAlt: Illustration of an aikido practitioner sharing records

learn.title: Learning Beyond the Dojo
learn.body: Through exchanges with Aikidoka training at other dojos — insights you can't gain from your usual practice alone — sharpen your techniques even further.

community.title:
A Community That
Crosses Borders
community.body: Available in both Japanese and English. A place to share your learnings with Aikidoka training at dojos overseas.
community.note: ※ You can also set your records to be shared and visible only to members of your own dojo.
community.imageAlt: Illustration of aikido practitioners from different countries

faq.title:
Frequently Asked Questions
Before Getting Started

security.question: Will my saved records be deleted? Can other people see them?
security.answer: Your data is safely stored in the cloud, so please rest assured. We use a highly secure communication protocol, so there is no risk of your data being stolen.

easeOfUse.question: Can people who are not comfortable with smartphones use it?
easeOfUse.answer: It is designed to be easy to use even for those who don't use smartphones frequently. If you find the text too small, you can also change the font size.

languages.question: Is it only for Japanese users?
languages.answer: International users are also welcome. The app is available in both Japanese and English.

mobileApp.question: Is there no smartphone app?
mobileApp.answer: Currently, you can access it directly from a web browser. Adding it to your smartphone's home screen lets you use it like an app. iOS and Android apps are also currently in development. We will notify you at your registered email address once they are released.
